package rulefixtures

import (
	"net"
)

// scenario for dns_lookup_for_access_control: `net.LookupHost` or `net.LookupAddr` results used in access control decisions
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario706Positive(host string) bool {
	records, _ := net.LookupHost(host)
	return len(records) > 0
}
